_thresholds_note: Optional gas_ratio / order_cv override ParticleMarkCore defaults (2.2 / 0.18). Omit to use defaults.

mark_scheme.accept_en: ≥6 particles in a regular, touching arrangement (a neat lattice) = solid.
mark_scheme.accept_zh: ≥6 颗粒子，整齐挨着排成规律的格子 = 固态。
mark_scheme.reject_en: Spread-out (gas) or touching-but-irregular (liquid) arrangements, or fewer than 6 particles.
mark_scheme.reject_zh: 散开（气态）、挨着但排乱（液态），或少于 6 颗。
mark_scheme.ignore_en: Exact positions are not graded — only the overall arrangement and the count.
mark_scheme.ignore_zh: 粒子精确位置不计分 —— 只看整体排列规律和颗数。
